company_context: Securing Data in an AI world | Fortanix Join Fortanix at NVIDIA GTC 2026, San Jose. Know More ✕ Confidential AI AI Innovation Without Fear of Exposure Secure AI models, prompts, and data in use with Confidential Computing for trust, security and sovereignty. Learn More Download Solution Brief Fortanix at NVIDIA GTC 2026 March 16-19, 2026 | San Jose Convention Center | San Jose Request a Meeting Confidential AI AI Innovation Without Fear of Exposure Secure AI models, prompts, and data in use with Confidential Computing for trust, security and sovereignty. Learn More Download Solution Brief Fortanix at NVIDIA GTC 2026 March 16-19, 2026 | San Jose Convention Center | San Jose Request a Meeting Confidential AI AI Innovation Without Fear of Exposure Secure AI models, prompts, and data in use with Confidential Computing for trust, security and sovereignty. Learn More Download Solution Brief 1 2 Securing the World’s Data The Fortanix Platform We Transform Enterprise Data and AI Security Fortanix transforms rigid, outdated data security practices, while giving teams the power to build safe enterprise AI applications, all on a unified, scalable security platform. Cryptographic Security Posture Assessment Discover, assess, and remediate your encryption key vulnerabilities with powerful insights into your cryptographic security posture across multicloud and on-prem environments. Data Encryption and Tokenization Protect data as it’s being used in addition to at-rest and in-transit. Fortanix encrypts or tokenizes critical workloads, databases, virtual machines, filesystems, and other sensitive data for complete security and compliance without performance loss. Enterprise Key Management Store and manage cryptographic keys, certificates, secrets, and more from one place. Adopt natively integrated HSMs, available as SaaS or an appliance, to ensure the sovereignty of your most sensitive assets. Secure, Turnkey GenAI Solution Prioritize the security of data and GenAI models to mitigate risk, ensure trusted responses, and compliance with regulations. See the Fortanix platform Our Platform Secure, Streamline, and Scale on a Unified Platform Accelerate innovation, minimize risk, and adopt productive, secure data workflows at scale. Fortanix transforms outdated, disjointed data security practices by consolidating them onto a powerful platform backed by confidential computing. Mitigate Risk Encrypt your data at-rest, in-transit, and in-use across complex, multicloud environments and LLMs. Reduce Cost Spend less on integrations and point solutions with a unified data security platform that lowers your total cost of ownership. Grow Your Business Incorporate the latest GenAI capabilities, optimize your stack, and grow your business with fast, performant data workflows that drive innovation. Secured by Confidential Computing Confidential computing protects data and applications by running them in secure enclaves that isolate the data and code to prevent unauthorized access

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like yours secure and manage their data in an AI-driven world. I came across your company and saw that you're attending the NVIDIA GTC 2026 conference, so I thought it would be a great opportunity to touch base.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Ah, yeah, we are attending the conference. But to be honest, our plate is pretty full with our current projects and initiatives. What makes you think DeepData AI is a good fit for us?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Well, our solution is specifically designed to help companies like yours protect their sensitive data and AI models from exposure. We've seen a lot of success with similar companies in the past, and I think we could really help you address some of the security concerns you may have.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I see. Security is definitely a top priority for us, but we've already invested heavily in our current security infrastructure. I'm not sure if we're ready to rip and replace what we have with a new solution. Plus, I've heard that DeepData AI can be pretty pricey. Can you tell me a bit more about your pricing model?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Absolutely. Our pricing is based on the amount of data being processed, and we offer tiered pricing plans to fit different company sizes and needs. I can give you a more detailed breakdown if you're interested. But I want to assure you that our solution is designed to be scalable and cost-effective in the long run.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the offer, but like I said, our budget is already allocated for the year. And even if we were to consider a new solution, we'd need to go through a pretty rigorous evaluation process, which would likely take several months. I'm not sure if we have the bandwidth to take on a new project like this right now.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand. I can definitely see how that would be a challenge. But I want to emphasize that our solution is designed to be easy to integrate and can be implemented in a relatively short period of time. We've also had success with other companies in similar situations, and I think we could really help you drive some significant value.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the pitch, Alex, but I think we're going to have to pass on DeepData AI for now. If you could just send me an email with some more information, I'll make sure to take a look at it when I have some more time. But for now, I don't think we're a good fit. Thanks for reaching out, though!

analysis.raw:
Score: 4
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Timing
Feedback: The seller should have more effectively addressed the buyer's timing concerns and explored potential flexibility in the evaluation process to keep the conversation alive. Sentiment: Neutral
